runs.text: VP, IoT Software Operations and Support, PTC

paragraphs.text: Mike JaspersonVP, IoT Software Operations and Support, PTC

notes:
Full customer story here: PTC improves operational efficiency with migration to Azure Database for PostgreSQL | Microsoft Customer Stories

As a global leader in product lifecycle management, PTC specializes in cutting-edge software that helps companies of all sizes transform how they design, manufacture, and maintain their products. Whether building planes, medical devices, wind turbines, or computers, businesses can rely on PTC’s portfolio of software as a solution (SaaS) and cloud-native solutions for innovation and efficiency. 

Challenge
To continue improvements in performance and scalability, better optimize database sizing and costs, and position itself for advanced innovation, PTC needed better standardization and control over its deployment automation.
Needed greater standardization, scalability, and control over deployment automation
Existing infrastructure limited ability to optimize performance and cost at scale
Sought to support future AI innovation and enhance service continuity for critical customers

Solution
PTC moved more than 300 customers to Azure Database for PostgreSQL. It used Azure Database Migration Service to move from a virtual machine–based infrastructure to Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS), facilitating the process of delivering SaaS services.
Migrated 300+ customers to Azure Database for PostgreSQL and Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS)
Used Azure Database Migration Service for seamless transition from VM-based infrastructure
Enabled proactive service management with Azure Monitor and improved security via Microsoft Defender

Impact 
The migration simplifies deployment, enabling PTC to use telemetry data more effectively for proactive service management and continuity for customers. It also helps control costs and optimize resource usage while supporting PTC for continued AI innovation.
Achieved superior performance, faster processing, and simplified deployments
Gained better control over resources, version upgrades, and operational costs
Positioned for generative AI innovation and real-time insights through connected IoT platforms
